в—Џ Good. Now let me commit:

  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget && git
  в”‚ add packages/core/src/canvas/server.js && git commit -m "fix: merge partial
  в”‚ position in PATCH /widget to preserve existing x/y
  в”‚ 
  в”‚ When only --x or --y was provided, the server wrote a widget_moved eventвЂ¦
  в”” 7 lines...

в—Џ Done вЂ” two layers of fix:

   1. API fix (server.js): PATCH /widget now merges incoming position with existing вЂ” {
   y: 4080 } preserves the current x instead of zeroing it
   2. Docs fix (previous commit): Skills/agent docs still warn to provide both axes as
  a best practice fallback

  Now --y 4080 alone just worksв„ў.
